userProfile.name: A Determined Designer
userProfile.currentRealEstateAssets: 3 plots of land with wife (1 in Da Nang valued at ~2B VND)

coreValuesAndIdentity.title: Who I Want To Be
coreValuesAndIdentity.drivingPrinciple: To go as far as I could.

tenYearVision.title: The 14 Billion VND Master Plan
tenYearVision.impactGoal: To motivate others by retelling my story after achieving these goals.

focus: Aggressive upskilling in management and leadership.
Become an indispensable specialist at work.
Maximize savings rate and automate investing.

milestones.career: Become the go-to expert on the team and express leadership ambitions to management.
milestones.finance: Grow liquid investment portfolio well past the 1B VND mark.
milestones.personal: Complete a half-marathon and establish a consistent reading habit (e.g., 2 books/month).

focus: Secure the Manager role, either internally or by switching companies.
Begin planning and financing the first major construction project.

milestones.career: Successfully transition into a management role, leading a team.
milestones.finance: Break ground on the first new house.

focus: Excel as a senior leader and explore secondary income (e.g., consulting).
Leverage investment returns as a significant income source.

milestones.career: Achieve the target income range of 150M-300M VND/month.
milestones.finance: Complete all asset goals: 2 new houses built, 2B VND car purchased, 5B VND in investment account.
milestones.personal: Have a powerful, data-backed success story ready to share and inspire others.
